# CLI reference

The complete reference for the `libredash` command-line interface.

## Commands

- [libredash admin](/docs/cli/admin): Administrative utilities
- [libredash admin backup](/docs/cli/admin-backup): Create a consistent LibreDash instance backup
- [libredash admin bootstrap](/docs/cli/admin-bootstrap): Bootstrap an owner principal and API token
- [libredash admin maintenance](/docs/cli/admin-maintenance): Prune bounded operational history
- [libredash admin restore](/docs/cli/admin-restore): Restore LibreDash from a validated instance backup
- [libredash admin storage](/docs/cli/admin-storage): Maintain analytical storage
- [libredash admin storage cleanup](/docs/cli/admin-storage-cleanup): Reconcile serving-state snapshots and clean DuckLake storage
- [libredash agent](/docs/cli/agent): Use the LibreDash read-only agent
- [libredash agent ask](/docs/cli/agent-ask): Ask the LibreDash read-only agent a question
- [libredash agent conversations](/docs/cli/agent-conversations): List agent conversations
- [libredash agent tools](/docs/cli/agent-tools): List generated agent tools
- [libredash api](/docs/cli/api): Call any generated LibreDash API operation
- [libredash api call](/docs/cli/api-call): Call a generated API operation
- [libredash api describe](/docs/cli/api-describe): Describe a generated API operation
- [libredash api list](/docs/cli/api-list): List generated API operations
- [libredash config](/docs/cli/config): Inspect and validate process-global configuration
- [libredash config validate](/docs/cli/config-validate): Validate the active server environment
- [libredash dashboards](/docs/cli/dashboards): Inspect dashboards
- [libredash dashboards components](/docs/cli/dashboards-components): List dashboard page components
- [libredash dashboards describe](/docs/cli/dashboards-describe): Describe a dashboard
- [libredash dashboards filter-options](/docs/cli/dashboards-filter-options): List dashboard filter options
- [libredash dashboards list](/docs/cli/dashboards-list): List dashboards
- [libredash dashboards query-page](/docs/cli/dashboards-query-page): Query a dashboard page
- [libredash dashboards query-table](/docs/cli/dashboards-query-table): Query a dashboard table
- [libredash dashboards table-data](/docs/cli/dashboards-table-data): Query dashboard table data
- [libredash dashboards visual](/docs/cli/dashboards-visual): Describe a dashboard visual
- [libredash dashboards visual-data](/docs/cli/dashboards-visual-data): Query dashboard visual data
- [libredash healthcheck](/docs/cli/healthcheck): Check the local LibreDash readiness endpoint
- [libredash login](/docs/cli/login): Store a LibreDash API token for a target
- [libredash plan](/docs/cli/plan): Emit a deterministic configuration-as-code plan
- [libredash publish](/docs/cli/publish): Publish a configuration-as-code project
- [libredash publishes](/docs/cli/publishes): Inspect publishes
- [libredash publishes list](/docs/cli/publishes-list): List publishes
- [libredash schema](/docs/cli/schema): Inspect LibreDash YAML schemas
- [libredash schema export](/docs/cli/schema-export): Export generated schema artifacts
- [libredash search](/docs/cli/search): Search workspace assets
- [libredash semantic-models](/docs/cli/semantic-models): Inspect semantic models
- [libredash semantic-models dataset](/docs/cli/semantic-models-dataset): Describe a semantic model dataset
- [libredash semantic-models datasets](/docs/cli/semantic-models-datasets): List semantic model datasets
- [libredash semantic-models describe](/docs/cli/semantic-models-describe): Describe a semantic model
- [libredash semantic-models explain-preview](/docs/cli/semantic-models-explain-preview): Explain a semantic model dataset row preview
- [libredash semantic-models explain-query](/docs/cli/semantic-models-explain-query): Explain a semantic model dataset query
- [libredash semantic-models fields](/docs/cli/semantic-models-fields): List semantic model dataset fields
- [libredash semantic-models list](/docs/cli/semantic-models-list): List semantic models
- [libredash semantic-models preview](/docs/cli/semantic-models-preview): Preview semantic model dataset rows
- [libredash semantic-models query](/docs/cli/semantic-models-query): Query a semantic model dataset
- [libredash serve](/docs/cli/serve): Run the LibreDash HTTP server
- [libredash validate](/docs/cli/validate): Validate a configuration-as-code project
- [libredash workspaces](/docs/cli/workspaces): Inspect workspaces
- [libredash workspaces list](/docs/cli/workspaces-list): List workspaces
